function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring the eight requested finance records into YAML frontmatter and deleting the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system, used process-next-inbox-item, OCR, migration, and finance schema guidance; preserved original note bodies and deleted the inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to run eight existing finance docs through OCR. Each listed file contained visible record fields and line items sufficient for the required finance frontmatter schema, so I added YAML frontmatter in place per 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md, 99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md, and 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, then deleted the processed inbox file per 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md.
completed_steps_laconic: write 8 finance records with YAML frontmatter
